NBF CONNECT PARTNERSHIPS

Partner with India's Network of Disciplined Youth

Connect with verified Shurveers from NCC, NSS, Sports, Scouts, NYKS, Civil Defence, and service-oriented communities. Build impactful programs, internships, volunteering initiatives, recruitment pipelines, and leadership opportunities through NBF Connect.

Register as Partner Schedule a Discussion

Why Organizations Partner with NBF Connect

Verified Youth Network

Access disciplined, trained, and service-oriented young individuals.

Meaningful Engagement

Create internships, projects, events, volunteering programs, and leadership initiatives.

Trusted Platform

Structured onboarding, transparent processes, and verified participation.

National Reach

Connect with youth communities across Bharat through a unified platform.

Create Opportunities. Build Leaders.

NBF Connect helps organizations engage with disciplined youth who demonstrate leadership, commitment, teamwork, and community service. Together, we create opportunities that benefit both organizations and the next generation of nation-builders.

The Shurveer Edge

What makes our talent different from standard workforce pools.

Leadership Trained

Every Shurveer has undergone rigorous training in leading teams and managing responsibilities under pressure.

Punctual & Reliable

Discipline is in their DNA. Expect 100% attendance and on-time performance for every shift or project.

Team Players

Trained in organizational structures, they integrate seamlessly into your existing workforce and hierarchy.

Event-Ready

Highly effective for large-scale operations, crowd management, logistics, and retail support.

Verified Talent

We perform multi-level verification of their organization certificates (NCC/NSS/Scouts) and identity.

Who Can Partner With Us?

Educational Institutions

NGOs & Foundations

Corporate Organizations

Startups & Innovation Hubs

Government & Public Sector Bodies

Sports & Leadership Organizations

Together, We Build Opportunities That Matter.

Join NBF Connect in creating a stronger ecosystem where discipline, leadership, and service connect with real-world opportunities.

Become an NBF Connect Partner
NBF Connect

"Connecting disciplined youth with real opportunities and building a stronger, self-reliant Bharat."

Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports
